title: MERN Stack Development
description: 10-week intensive programme covering MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js. Completed under Prof. Sudarshan Iyengar with a real-world full-stack project and viva evaluation.

title: Red Hat Certified System Administrator (RHCSA)
description: Hands-on training in Red Hat Enterprise Linux system administration, Docker containerisation, and Linux-based application deployment workflows.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Foundational to intermediate Python programming concepts including data structures, OOP, and scripting for automation.

title: Database Management Systems
description: Comprehensive study of relational databases, SQL, normalisation, transactions, and query optimisation.
